title: Add Sketch My Mood to Vibes
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Feelings into pixels
gist.blurb: Sketch My Mood joins the Vibes showcase. It's AI art therapy that turns your emotions into expressive masterpieces.
gist.summary: Added 'Sketch My Mood' to the platform showcase, an application that generates artwork based on user emotional input.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new creative tool for visualizing emotions through AI-generated art.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee as an artist. She is wearing a beret and holding a paintbrush, standing next to an easel. The canvas shows a colorful, abstract representation of a 'mood' (swirls of pastel colors). The setting is a cozy art studio or garden corner.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting colorful abstract swirls on a canvas easel. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'MOOD ART'. Emotionally warm, creative vibes.
